'''Omwaan''' was an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] who resided on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] sometime after [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].

==Biography==
Omwaan was a novice adventurer who would often teach [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] the [[Language/Legends|language]] of [[Shyriiwook/Legends|Shyriiwook]]. Omwaan also lost his right arm some time in the past, and had it replaced with a blue [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic prosthesis]]. It is not known how he lost his arm, though he could have easily lost it on a dangerous adventure. Sometime after [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], Omwaan decided to leave Kachirho, and was superseded by [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], who gave spacers adventuring advice in his stead.

==Behind the scenes==
Omwaan was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the
[[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|MMORPG]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''. In the game, Omwaan stood in the city of Kachirho, and would teach players the language of Shyriiwook. However, after the New-Game Enhancement of [[2005]], Omwaan was removed from the game, and replaced with [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]].

*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1st}}
